---
title: "Teaching"
---

## The University of Texas at Austin

### Assistant Instructor

- Introduction to Macroeconomics, Summer 2026

### Graduate Teaching Assistant

- Macroeconomics II (PhD), Spring 2026
- Introduction to Macroeconomics, Introduction to Microeconomics, Evolution of Economic Thought, Economic Statistics (Undergraduate), Fall 2022 - Fall 2025

## Universidad Alberto Hurtado, Santiago, Chile

### Graduate Teaching Assistant

- Macroeconomics I (Master), Fall 2016
